title: Claude Opus 4.6 & Sonnet 4.6
summary: anthropic just dropped 1M token context for Opus class models at normal prices. means you can dump entire codebases, long documents, whatever into one conversation without losing your mind or your wallet. fr this changes the game for long-form reasoning.
takeaway: 1M context window + 128K output, now at standard pricing

title: Windsurf IDE
summary: the first agentic IDE that actually lets you compare models side-by-side, plan before you code, and run multiple agents at once. cascade panes + live preview make it lowkey the best dev experience rn.
takeaway: agentic IDE with Arena Mode, Plan Mode, and parallel multi-agent sessions

title: Manus Browser Agent
summary: Manus is literally your power intern — scopes tasks, shows you exactly what it did, and handles high-volume market research. not just black-box magic, you can actually audit it and learn from the replay.
takeaway: consumer-facing AI agent with Task Replay for transparency + Wide Research mode
